headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Linde (LIN) After Its Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Linde at around US$495.91 is offering value right now, it helps to step back from the share price and look at what different valuation methods are actually saying. The stock has pulled back over the past week, with a 7 day return of 3.7% decline, and is also down 2.4% over the past month. It is still up 15.6% year to date and 6.5% over the past year, with returns of 42.8% over 3 years and 80.9% over 5 years. Recent coverage of Linde has focused on its position as...
